text: Amazon maintains aggressive R&D investment intensity at 16.20% of revenue in Q2 2025, with R&D expenses totaling $27.2 billion. This represents an increase from Q1 2025 R&D spending of $23.0 billion, reflecting the company's continued commitment to innovation across AI, cloud infrastructure, and logistics capabilities. The elevated R&D intensity underscores Amazon's strategic positioning for long-term growth, though it weighs on near-term free cash flow generation.
